_purpose: Screen-4 (Keep or Revert, Day N) numbers per persona. Read by GET /reset-sessions/{id}/outcome in mock mode. Real-mode computation uses recently-played + top-artists deltas; see architecture.md §4.3-4.4. Riya is intentionally absent — she is ineligible for Pulse and therefore never has a session to compute an outcome for.

demo-karthik-001.narrative_before: Language mix was 81% Telugu — the axis had visibly collapsed.
demo-karthik-001.narrative_after: Language mix now spans Tamil, Malayalam, Hindi and Telugu at close to even weights.

demo-aanya-002.narrative_before: Genre mix was 78% dream-pop / bedroom-indie — five sub-genres shrunk to two.
demo-aanya-002.narrative_after: Genre mix now spans darkwave, alt-R&B, indie-folk and hyperpop alongside her existing lane.
